channel.title: Io_uring on Moe's VR blog
channel.description: Recent content in Io_uring on Moe's VR blog

item.title: CVE-2024-0582, or Easy Kernel Exploitation
item.description: Introduction io_uring has been a heavily targeted subsystem in the Linux kernel — at one point it constituted 60% of kCTF entries (source). As with most newly introduced features, io_uring — since its introduction in 2019 — has been very bug-prone.
